primary_text:
200 VIP spots. First access to invest in FarmThru when the Birchal campaign opens in July.

VIP gets you priority access, exclusive founder Q&A and updates before anyone else. $5 refundable deposit to secure your spot.

FarmThru delivers regenerative food from 50+ farms to 2,000+ Sydney families. Invest from $50, capped at $10,000.

This is not financial advice. Read the Birchal disclosure document before making any investment decision.
headline: 200 VIP Spots. Then the Queue.
description: First access to invest in FarmThru. $5 refundable deposit. 50+ farms, 2,000+ customers.
creative_brief: Authentic scarcity with VIP spots. Clean structure: what's scarce, what VIP gets you, what FarmThru is, terms. Scarcity is real (campaign mechanics) not manufactured. Full compliance language. Reserve Your Spot CTA matches scarcity frame.
